channel.title: +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: cc-smith
item.description: In my own research, I have found it rewarding to think of rta- as meaning something like “(original) deed” or “precedent” which is a model for emulation, a kind of cosmogonic blue print. That is what allows rta- in the plural to reverse to verses, they are the original speech act (sūkta) that the community attributes to a legendary or primordial figure. In mind it is why rtāvan- has that long ā, its an aluksamāsa.
